name: Large Decorative Fabric Box Ivory - Brightroom™: Polypropylene & Polyester, Rectangle, 10" H, 15.5" D, 13" W
description:
Add an appealing storage solution to your home with this Large Decorative Fabric Box from Brightroom™. Upholstered with fabric, this large ivory-colored storage box has an open top with a lid for easy access to the contents stored inside. Great for neatly storing blankets, books, toys and more, it pairs well with any decor style, and it features a white paper insert at the front for easy labeling.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
